content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.15%, Auto leading +2.26%, IT +1.48%, and VIX collapsing -5.87% to 16.99 — risk-on tape. Existing book is showing solid unrealized gains (+1.03% session, +INR 10.3K). Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on names that have moved in our favor; not chasing breakouts when the book is already 50% deployed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.7%, SL already at 1028.66 (well above entry 984, locking in ~4.5%). Current SL is appropriate; CMP 1045 has cooled from 1050 high. Hold trail in place — already meets breakeven+ mandate. No-op MODIFY avoided; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Held -1.9%, SL 119 intact. Gold is a portfolio hedge — keep as defensive ballast against the equity beta in the rest of book. Risk-on day means gold underperforms; this is expected. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.7%, SL already at 1438 (entry 1412.94, locked in ~1.8% above breakeven). Stock breaking out to fresh 52w highs on volume-led Q4. Existing trail is appropriate — no-op avoided."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1%, SL 401 just above entry 404.50… actually slightly below entry. P&L not yet at +2% threshold for breakeven trail mandate. Keep current SL; Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1%, SL 1742 (entry 1734) — already at breakeven+. Organon acquisition adds leverage risk; cautious stance. Hold tight SL; below +2% threshold for further trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, SL 318 just below entry 320.50. Below +2% threshold for trail to breakeven. Defensive utility play with record peak demand tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 471.00,
      "new_target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.5% (CMP 480.70 vs entry 469). Triggers breakeven trail mandate. Tightening SL from 469 to 471 (above entry, locking in +0.4% min). Q4 strong (+11% PAT), Rs 26.75 FY26 dividend, MOFSL PT 530."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, SL 605 (entry 612). Tomorrow ex-dividend Apr 30 (Rs 11) — expect price drop ~Rs 11 ex-date which will hit current SL. Accept the dividend offset; below +2% threshold for SL trail. Holding through ex-date for dividend capture."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 2400 from prior session still working. Not stacking duplicate. Letting existing order live or expire."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 23.65 still working from prior session. Not stacking."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 443 still working. Not stacking. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) already represented in book — adding TATAPOWER on fill would push cluster concentration."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.66,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks in +4.5% gain. No further trail needed; CMP 1045 within striking distance of target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; tolerate small drawdown for portfolio diversification benefit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry+25; volume-led breakout to 52w high. Let it run toward 1485 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% gain — no trail mandate yet. Q4 May 15 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry+8. Organon deal adds risk; tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% gain threshold for breakeven trail. Defensive utility; let position develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 471.00,
      "reasoning": "Triggered +2% gain rule. Trailing SL from 469 (entry) to 471 to lock in minimum gain while letting position run toward MOFSL PT 530."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 605.00,
      "reasoning": "Holding through ex-dividend Apr 30 for Rs 11 capture. Accept SL trigger risk on ex-date drop; thesis is the dividend + Q4 record results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Cancelling stale OPEN orders deferred to next cycle if they haven't filled — GLENMARK 2400 LIMIT was placed >7 hrs ago and stock has likely moved; will reassess. Auto sector (HEROMOTOCO, MARUTI) leading today but book already has Auto-adjacent exposure via consumption theme. RELIANCE bearish post Q4 -12.55% PAT — passing despite +4.36% intraday bounce. BHARTIARTL Q4 today (binary) — passing on event-day entry. GRSE up +12.5% — gap chase, passing.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with +1.03% unrealized session gain and +0.58% experiment-to-date. Three OPEN orders still working (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) which if filled would push deployment to ~60%+. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION. Focus this tick: trailed COALINDIA SL to lock in gains. PNBHOUSING and NESTLEIND already have appropriate SL trails in place. 5-day rolling P&L is negative (profit factor 0.4x) — discipline suggests fewer, higher-quality entries. Cluster check: NTPC+POWERGRID+COALINDIA = ~22% of capital in power/energy/metals cluster. Adding TATAPOWER on fill would push to ~26% — at threshold. No new energy/power adds today."
}
